source: Self-run BridgeSentry SmartShot re-implementation against the 12 benchmark suite, using mutable snapshot operators from docs/REIMPL_SMARTSHOT_SPEC.md.
doi_or_url: Liu et al., SmartShot, FSE 2025, DOI 10.1145/3715714
methodology_note: Self-run mode requires real DualEVM coverage. When SLOAD taint is unavailable, the reimplementation uses metadata_seeded bridge root-cause slots and records that provenance per finding.

nomad.note: 20/20 runs produced SmartShot findings; taint_sources=sload_inspector; double_validation=validated

qubit.note: 18/20 runs produced SmartShot findings; taint_sources=metadata_seeded; double_validation=validated
